arts.ttl: The story of Spurs' Mathys Tel
arts.sum: When Tel captained France to victory at the UEFA European Under-17 Championship in 2022, there were two fellow members of the Rennes academy alongside him in the starting line-up in their 2-1 win over the Netherlands in the final - defender Jeanuel Belocian, now at Bayer Leverkusen, and attacking midfielder Desire Doue, who joined Paris Saint-Germain last year. In August 2021, when Tel became the youngest player ever to appear in a professional match for Rennes, aged just 16 years and 110 days old, breaking the record set by Eduardo Camavinga, who had joined Rennes at the age of 11.

arts.ttl: Excl: Liverpool have held talks & will be in contact again over transfer that has club “seriously worried”
arts.sum: Liverpool have recently had contacts with Joshua Kimmich as there is the growing feeling he’s heading towards a free transfer away from Bayern Munich this summer. Sources with a close understanding of the situation have informed CaughtOffside that the Reds most recently contacted the player at the start of January to discuss a possible move […] The post Excl: Liverpool have held talks & will be in contact again over transfer that has club “seriously worried” appeared first on CaughtOffside.
